title: Audit a background job for retry safety
description: Read a job/consumer and report whether redelivery is safe, retries back off, and failures are dead-lettered.
body: Use when asked whether a worker is reliable. Actions: inspect the handler to verify it is idempotent on the message/job id; verify ack happens only after the effect commits; check that retries use capped backoff with jitter and that a max-attempt path routes to a DLQ; verify concurrency is bounded. Do not assume the broker dedups for you. Report and record the exact handler location and classify gaps as non-idempotent, ack-before-commit, no-backoff, or no-DLQ. This skill is read-only and must not run against production queues. Validation signals include a confirmed redelivery-single-effect path. Risk boundary: a non-idempotent retried side effect on a sensitive path is a blocking finding to escalate.
